name: Parmesan Chicken Fingers
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Boneless, skinless, chicken breasts, cut into 1/4 inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together buttermilk, garlic and red-pepper seasoning in a large bowl.
2. Add chicken; toss until evenly coated.
3. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
4. Prepare coating: Combine cracker crumbs, paprika, salt and 2 tablespoons Parmesan in a pie plate.
5. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and coat with nonstick spray.
6. Drain the chicken; dip in the coating, tossing to coat.
7. Arrange on the baking sheet. Sprinkle with remaining Parmesan.
8. Bake in a preheated 450°F oven for 8-10 minutes or until no longer pink in the center (or for frozen: bake for 12 minutes or until no longer pink in the center).
9. Per serving: 198 calories, 29 g protein, 2 g fat, 14 g carbohydrate, 555 mg sodium, 69 mg cholesterol.
